title: Customizable Player Models Plasmo Voice compat
description: Adds compatibility between Customizable Player Models and Plasmo Voice
body:
Adds speaking animation integration between [Customizable Player Models](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-player-models) and [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice).

Enables playing the 'Speaking' animation on Customizable Player Models models, while using Plasmo Voice.

The Animation frame depends on sound volume of the player.

Works with Forge and Fabric.
